title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Expeditors India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Expeditors India
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!
